title: Deeper Dark
description:
Deeper Dark is a mod that adds a new dimension the the ancient city Centre!

To light the portal you need to right click a glass bottle on a Warden to get captured Soul
body:
Deeper Dark is a mod that adds a new dimension the the ancient city Centre!

To light the portal you need to right click a glass bottle on a Warden to get captured Soul

 

Found a Bug? The best way to report bugs is in Belgie's Discord

Want to Help with Features/Ideas? Send Belgie a Message on Discord

If you have any suggestions of what you would like to see in the mod let us know!
 


To exit the Deeper Dark Dimension you need to complete advancements to earn Sculk Infested Sturdy Stone,

With Sculk Infested Sturdy Stone you can build a Portal like a Nether portal to be sent back to either the world spawn or your spawn Point!

 
The Deeper Dark is a Cave Dimension filled with Sculk and Ancient Cities, You can also find a new Mob here and loads of new blocks

 
We plan to update the mod on the Last Friday of every Month the add loads of new Content and Features

We are aware of a bug where the mod is referred to by Overexpansion. This will be fixed in a future update
